title: Mercury Man
original_title: มนุษย์เหล็กไหล
overview: After a brush with a strange substance, an average fireman transforms into something far greater than himself — the Mercury Man. Endowed with fantastic superpowers, he will now use his abilities to help conquer the forces of evil.
